message:
fix(e2e): Fix double response.json() call in status page test

The Response body stream can only be consumed once. Previously, the test
called response.json() twice - once to parse the body for assertions and
again in the step metadata. This would cause the test to fail with a
stream consumed error.

Fix: Parse the body once before the step, then reference the parsed body
in both the assertions and the metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
